decision_rule: binomial-aware: ambiguous if range_pp < 2*binomial_se_pp(n, p_mean); else flat if |r|<0.3; bending if range_pp>5 and monotone; else ambiguous
intervention_semantics: propagating: forward hook on transformer.h[L_INTERVENE] output replaces hidden states at 6 analog positions (last 6 before ':') with their rank-k SVD-truncated reconstructions; each generated token triggers a full cache-less forward so downstream attention always re-attends through the intervened residual stream.
